mnemonics: Remember: Arrays are like a row of houses (indexed), Linked Lists are like treasure hunts (pointers), Stacks are like a stack of plates (LIFO), Queues are like a line at the movies (FIFO).
keyPoints: Linked Lists: Dynamic size, sequential access.
Stacks: Last In First Out (LIFO) operations.
Queues: First In First Out (FIFO) operations.
commonMistakes: Using array when frequent insertions/deletions are needed (linked list better).
Not checking for empty stack/queue before pop/dequeue.
